bookSourceComment: FQNovel-unidbg书源(批量版) - 使用批量章节API,支持搜索/发现/详情/目录/章节,适合连续阅读；段评聚合接口: POST /api/legado/comment
bookSourceUrl: http://[替换为你的ip或域名]:[你的端口号]
exploreUrl:
搜索::http://[替换为你的ip或域名]:[你的端口号]/api/fqsearch/books?query={{key}}&offset={{(page-1)*20}}&count=20
热门推荐::http://[替换为你的ip或域名]:[你的端口号]/api/fqsearch/books?query=推荐&offset=0&count=20
最近更新::http://[替换为你的ip或域名]:[你的端口号]/api/fqsearch/books?query=最新&offset=0&count=20
header:
Content-Type: application/json
User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36

ruleBookInfo.author: $.data.author
ruleBookInfo.name: $.data.bookName

ruleExplore.author: $.author
ruleExplore.bookUrl: http://[替换为你的ip或域名]:[你的端口号]/api/fqnovel/book/{{$.bookId}}
ruleExplore.name: $.bookName

ruleSearch.author: $.author
ruleSearch.bookUrl: http://[替换为你的ip或域名]:[你的端口号]/api/fqnovel/book/{{$.bookId}}
